{{Quote|The trooper was guarding a reactor repair facility when Rebels blew it up. TD-334 was the only survivor.|Lieutenant Harburik|<ref name="SWG" />}}
'''TD-334''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harburik]]. During his service as a [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|sandtrooper]], TD-334 was stationed on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], TD-334 was caught in a [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] accident when the [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] repair facility he was guarding was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. Though he was the sole survivor, TD-334's [[Brain/Legends|mental faculties]] were negatively influenced by the radiation. After displaying an unorthodox desire to desert the Empire to become an image designer, Harburik commissioned an Imperial operative with quietly bringing the disturbed sandtrooper back to his base of operations in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Don't stop me! I'm leaving the Army to become an image designer! I always wanted to be an image designer.|TD-334|<ref name="SWG" />}}
During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] identified as TD-334 served in the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] under a [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]] [[Speciesism|xenophobe]] known as [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harburik]]. Operating out of his base in the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Harburik oversaw the command of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] conducting missions in the area.<ref name="SWG" />

TD-334 and a number of other [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stormtroopers were responsible for guarding a [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] repair facility not far outside of Mos Eisley. However, sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces blew up this reactor facility. The attack [[Death/Legends|killed]] all of TD-334's comrades. As the sole survivor, TD-334 began walking aimlessly throughout the [[Desert/Legends|desert]], stricken by a sudden desire to desert the Empire to become an [[image designer]]. It became apparent that TD-334's [[Brain/Legends|brain]] was negatively affected by the [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] released by the explosion. This drastically altered the [[Trooper/Legends|trooper's]] personality, compelling him to start a new life. When Lieutenant Harburik learned of the situation, he became concerned that news of the situation would become public knowledge.<ref name="SWG" />
{{Gamemechanics}}
Harburik's concerns were alleviated when a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] loyal to the Empire agreed to help resolve the situation. Harburik asked the operative to apprehend TD-334 without committing undue harm. He also asked that the situation be kept confidential, as other troopers may have misunderstood the situation. Ultimately, the Imperial operative maintained secrecy, and located the disturbed sandtrooper without resorting to combat.<ref name="SWG" />

When TD-334 was approached by the Imperial operative, he commented that [[Color/Legends|lavender]] highlights would give [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper helmets]] a bold statement. With that said, TD-334 was placed under arrest, but not without further announcing his intentions to leave the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] to focus on more artistic pursuits. Despite this unorthodox behavior, TD-334 complied with operative and was safely brought back to Harburik in Mos Eisley.<ref name="SWG" />

With TD-334 now under Imperial custody, the operative received a reward of 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Although he knew it to be a troubling situation, Harburik claimed there was no better way for the situation to have turned out. He asked that the Imperial-aligned spacer simply take the reward and pretend that the whole thing never happened.<ref name="SWG" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Prior to the radiation accident, TD-334 was an ordinary stormtrooper, diligently serving Lieutenant Harburik as a guard for a reactor repair facility. However, following the Rebel attack on the facility, TD-334's mind became adversely affected by the released radiation. This caused a significant change in the stormtrooper's personality, causing him to display unorthodox behavior. The once loyal Imperial stormtrooper had turned into an eccentric free agent, committed to starting a new life as an image designer. While TD-334 did initially object to being placed under arrest, he did comply without resorting to violence.<ref name="SWG" />

==Equipment==
{{Quote|I think purple highlights would give these helmets a bold statement. No... not purple... LAVENDER!|TD-334|<ref name="SWG" />}}
During his affiliation with the Galactic Empire, TD-334 wore standard stormtrooper armor. He also wore a brownish [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldron]], a type of padded material worn to signify [[Military rank/Legends|rank]].<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
TD-334 was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Players who performed a series of [[:w:c:swg:Quest|quests]] for Harburik had to escort him safely back to [[:w:c:swg:Mos Eisley|Mos Eisley]]. Although the player could choose not to do Harburik's quests, this article assumes 100% game completion.<ref name="SWG" />

TD-334 wore a brownish shoulder pauldron, but his rank was never definitively identified in the quest dialogue.<ref name="SWG" />

When the player approached TD-334, the stormtrooper mentioned that he would be leaving the Army to become an [[:w:c:swg:Image Designer|image designer]]. However, this does not make sense, as stormtroopers were part of the Stormtrooper Corps, an [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] branch which operated separately from the [[:w:c:swg:Galactic Empire|Imperial]] Army. The developers may have simply erred when writing the dialogue, or it may have been an [[In-universe|in-character]] mistake made by TD-334, due to his altered mental state. It is also possible that his use of the word 'Army' was generic, meant to colloquially refer to the Stormtrooper Corps as a whole.<ref name="SWG" />
